title: pavetta corymbosa var. glabra
intro: Pavetta corymbosa var. glabra, also known as the Glabrous Pavetta, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, characterized by its woody stems and small, white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pavetta corymbosa var. glabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to herbal teas for various health benefits.
